function.description: Check if Currency use Integer
Check if Currency use Integer with decimal
Formats a length displayed inside the configurator. changed 2018-04, damit HallerTisch und Kitos indetisch sind

param.name: distance
param.description: The distance in the internal units, typically mm.

param.name: metric
param.description: Defines if the distance should be displayed in metric or imperial units.

function.description: Formats a length displayed inside the configurator. changed 2018-04, damit HallerTisch und Kitos indetisch sind

param.name: distance
param.description: The distance in the internal units, typically mm.

param.name: metric
param.description: Defines if the distance should be displayed in metric or imperial units.

function.description: It creates a mapping between a specific Topic Id and a Topic Guider Representation.
It creates a mapping between a specific Topic Id and a Topic Guider Representation.
tested, ob auf der usm printzone teile stehen.

function.name: setCategory
function.description: which elements should be changed by category expression

function.name: isVolumeOnSide
function.description: returns if volume is at given side of shelf

returnvalue.description: list of volumes sorted from top

function.name: getVolumesOnSide
function.description: get volumes on given side

returnvalue.description: list of volumes on given side

function.name: getAllVolumesOfConnectionId
function.description: get all volumes with same connectionid of given volume

returnvalue.description: list of volumes sorted from top

function.name: getVolumesInColumn
function.description: get all volumes in column of given volume, sorted from top

returnvalue.description: list of volumes in column, sorted from top

function.name: getVolumesInColumn
function.description: get all volumes in column of given volume, sorted from top

returnvalue.description: list of volumes in column, sorted from top

function.name: getVolumesInRow
function.description: get all volumes in row of given volume, sorted from right

returnvalue.description: list of volumes in row sorted from right

function.name: getVolumesInRow
function.description: get all volumes in row of given volume, sorted from right

returnvalue.description: list of volumes in row sorted from right

function.name: getRowVolumesAbove
function.description: get all volumes in row of given volume, sorted from right

returnvalue.description: list of volumes in column, sorted from right

function.name: getColumnVolumesLeft
function.description: get all volumes in row of given volume, sorted from top

returnvalue.description: list of volumes in column, sorted from top

function.name: getColumnVolumesRight
function.description: get all volumes in row of given volume, sorted from top

returnvalue.description: list of volumes in column, sorted from top
